query: SELECT id, title, LENGTH(sheetMusicAbc) as abc_length, SUBSTRING(sheetMusicAbc, 1, 500) as abc_start FROM songs WHERE sheetMusicAbc IS NOT NULL ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 3
